detail.description:
• Done without javascript
  • One of your GPs will now review your request.
  • Your practice will respond to you by phone or email before {date will appear here}

contained.title: Here are two important tips for ensuring you receive a response:

detail.description:
• A call from your practice may sometimes appear on your phone as "Blocked", "No caller ID" or "Private number"
  • Check your junk email folder

contained.title: What if I don’t get a call or email?<script>console.log('this is a script');</script>

detail.description: There is generally no need for you to contact the practice before {date will appear here}. But if they're unable to reach you by then, please let them know by using the link in your confirmation email or by calling the practice on {tel no will appear here}.<script>console.log('this is a script');</script>

contained.description: Thank you, {name}. Your request for {consultation name} has been securely sent to your GPs at {practice name}.<script>console.log('this is a script');</script>
